entitymodel.title: Entity of an Apache OFBiz Component - CustomerManagement
entitymodel.description: The CustomerManagement plugin reuses core OFBiz party entities: - Party (org.apache.ofbiz.party.party) - Person (org.apache.ofbiz.party.party) - ContactMech (org.apache.ofbiz.party.contact) - PartyContactMech (org.apache.ofbiz.party.contact) - PartyContactMechPurpose (org.apache.ofbiz.party.contact) - PostalAddress (org.apache.ofbiz.party.contact) - TelecomNumber (org.apache.ofbiz.party.contact) - PartyRelationship (org.apache.ofbiz.party.party) The FindCustomerView view-entity is in entitymodel_view.xml.
